message:
Fix plugin validation errors

- Sort marketplace.json alphabetically (prose before python)
- Update prose changelog config id to match plugin name

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,6 +39,11 @@
       "description": "Skills for managing the tenzir plugin marketplace",
       "source": "./plugins/meta"
     },
+    {
+      "name": "prose",
+      "description": "Style guidelines for technical prose",
+      "source": "./plugins/prose"
+    },
     {
       "name": "python",
       "description": "Python coding conventions for Tenzir projects",
@@ -48,11 +53,6 @@
       "name": "tql",
       "description": "Build TQL pipelines with the Tenzir MCP server",
       "source": "./plugins/tql"
-    },
-    {
-      "name": "prose",
-      "description": "Style guidelines for technical prose",
-      "source": "./plugins/prose"
     }
   ]
 }

@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-id: writing
-name: Writing Plugin
+id: prose
+name: Prose Plugin
 description: Writing guidelines for documentation, marketing, and more.
